title: Selling PDF Guides Without Gumroad: An Honest Side-by-Side Breakdown — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: In Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan, PayPal remains inaccessible to many digital creators. Sellers of PDF guides, in particular, face a unique set of challenges when trying to collect payments from their global audience without relying on the major payment gateways. Despite their popularity, Gumroad and Stripe also impose restrictions on creators from certain countries, making it difficult to monetize digital products. As a result, many creators are left searching for alternative solutions to sell their PDF guides without the constraints of traditional payment systems. If you're one of them, you're in the right place – let's explore the best options for selling digital products without Gumroad or PayPal.
What Each Option Actually Offers

While Gumroad and Stripe provide a range of features for selling digital products, they come with their own set of limitations. Gumroad, for instance, charges a commission on sales, and its payment processing fees can be steep. Stripe, on the other hand, requires creators to have a verified account and imposes restrictions on creators from certain countries. In contrast, NOWPayments offers a more inclusive solution, allowing creators to accept payments in over 300 cryptocurrencies without the need for a traditional payment processor or KYC verification. With NOWPayments' integration, you can sell your PDF guides without worrying about the restrictions of major payment gateways.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

When it comes to restricted countries, Gumroad and Stripe have strict policies in place. They may suspend or terminate accounts from countries that don't meet their requirements, leaving creators without a way to sell their digital products. In contrast, NOWPayments doesn't impose country-specific restrictions, making it an ideal solution for creators in Nigeria, Ghana, Pakistan, and other regions where traditional payment systems are not available. By using NOWPayments' infrastructure, you can focus on growing your business without worrying about the limitations of major payment gateways.

When it comes to payment speed, fees, and real costs, NOWPayments offers a more transparent and cost-effective solution. With NOWPayments, creators can accept payments in real-time, and the fees are significantly lower compared to Gumroad and Stripe. Additionally, NOWPayments doesn't charge any commission on sales, making it an attractive option for creators who want to maximize their earnings. By using NOWPayments' infrastructure, you can enjoy faster payment processing, lower fees, and higher revenue margins.

With NOWPayments' integration, creators can automate the delivery of their digital products, including PDF guides, without any manual intervention. This means that customers can receive their purchases instantly, without any delays or hassles. Additionally, NOWPayments provides real-time analytics and transaction logs, making it easier for creators to track their sales and revenue. By using NOWPayments' infrastructure, you can streamline your sales process and focus on growing your business.
